title: Create: Smart Compass
description: Change Nature's Compass textures and recipes to fit the Create style.
body:
This pack revamps [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass) and [Explorer's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass) to match closer with the [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create). 

![SmartCompassRecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71724f6e9eff26ab4a7e8fdf9c40190ea7b7355c.png) ![ExplorersCompassRecipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec331e41f217c56c26622817bce5a8b03e3f529a.png)



Changes:

- New texture for the nature's compass (Also changes the name to "Smart Compass")
- New texture for the explorer's compass.
- Change the crafting recipes to match with the new textures.

Installation:

The resource pack also works as a datapack, so you need to install it in both your resource packs folder and your world's datapacks folder. (You need to have "Create" with "Nature's Compass" and/or Explorer's Compass Installed)


Notes:

The crafting recipe for the explorer's compass could change in the future.
